final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a beauty skincare brand named "LUMEA BEAUTY".

Style/medium: needs a clean, bright, airy, feminine aesthetic with floral accents — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include three-column hero layout (left: copy column, center: model, right: product display), header bar at top, and benefit cards row at bottom
Subject: must include all elements across sections:
  Header: "LUMEA BEAUTY" logo (left), 5 navigation links, CTA button (top right)
  Hero center: young East Asian woman smiling, touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum
  Hero left: headline block, subheadline, 3 pill-shaped feature badges with small icons, 3 bullet points with pink checkmarks, 2 CTA buttons, trust badge line
  Hero right: moisturizing boost serum dropper bottle + packaging box, 3 floating stat cards (white rounded rectangles with gold accents)
  Bottom: 3 horizontal white rounded-rectangle benefit cards with icons
Scene/backdrop: needs a soft, light studio-style backdrop — exact background treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, diffused feminine lighting atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be soft pink and white dominant, with purple floral accents
Materials/textures: needs a soft, airy surface treatment — exact texture and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include all text verbatim:
  Header nav: "特徴" / "成分" / "お客様の声" / "使い方" / "FAQ"
  Header CTA button: "今すぐ試す"
  Headline: "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。"
  Subheadline: "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。"
  Feature badges: "敏感肌OK" / "高保湿" / "朝晩使える"
  Bullet points: "美容成分をしっかり届ける" / "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ" / "続けやすいシンプルケア"
  CTA buttons: "初回限定で試してみる >" / "成分をチェック >"
  Trust badges: "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし"
  Stat cards: "満足度 96%" / "美容成分 5種配合" / "愛用者 12,000人突破"
  Benefit cards: "うるおい" / "透明感" / "使いやすさ"
Constraints: must preserve all 3-column hero structure, header bar, and bottom benefit card row; all Japanese text must appear verbatim and legibly; stat cards must float with visible shadow/gold accent treatment
Avoid:
